title: Private atlas snapshot export CLI v0
problem: ticket-279/281 build validated atlas snapshots in memory; operators lack a CLI to write snapshot JSON to a private path from fixture-mode or research DB.
acceptance_criteria: CLI subcommand exports validated atlas snapshot JSON to --out path.
Re-run with same DB is byte-identical in fixture_mode.
Fail-closed on private-field leakage before write.
Golden pass and full pytest pass.
non_goals: Public export route or public-site consumption.
